question_text: Which of the following best describes the force of gravity?

options.label: A
options.text: A pulling force that attracts all objects towards the Earth

options.label: B
options.text: A pushing force that keeps objects on the ground

options.label: C
options.text: A force that only affects heavy objects

options.label: D
options.text: A force that increases when an object moves faster

explanation: Gravity is a pulling force that attracts objects towards the Earth. It acts on all objects with mass, not just heavy ones, and its strength doesn't depend on how fast something is moving.
